authority: repository workflow, documentation, policy, test, Git commit, main push, and remote-ref readback plus public upstream Git-ref identity reads; no authenticated GitHub setting, workflow-run, provider, environment-value, secret, deployment, message, release, approval-resume, or Production operation

checks.result: Exactly three workflows, five immutable action pins, and 15 exact authority identity/surface/target/status contracts passed; negative fixtures reject direct-invocation, inventory, permission, timeout, convergence, target, epoch, pin, readback, secret, tool-authority, classification, and containment drift.
check:docs passed 220 files and check:skills passed 167 files with 16 mirrors; current docs, READMEs, SPEC, plan, and local docs-maintainer profile route to the authority and automation owners.

A fresh Terra evaluator found and caused correction of three coherence gaps, recomputed every declared source hash, and then accepted all six actor, release, auto-review, observation-authority, emergency-containment, and action-pin scenarios.

Effect setup, boundaries, docs, skills, authority, 48 tooling tests, Ultracite, lint fixture, Knip, five package typechecks, and 250 app/package tests passed with schema-valid synthetic Executor configuration and no provider call.

postcondition: Bundjil now has bounded desired-source workflows, a complete machine-readable authority inventory, an automation admission register, immutable GitHub Action ownership, emergency containment limits, executable semantic controls, and fresh-context evidence without claiming provider actuality.
rollback: Revert this closeout and a1604f084073d1b379e594de36522169548e3f8d together while preserving HGI-300 through HGI-303, HGI-308, and HGI-310 evidence and unchanged runtime implementation.
limitations: Repository source, public Git refs, local checks, and fresh-context acceptance do not prove GitHub settings, variables, tokens, OIDC, secret availability, hosted action behavior, workflow runs, comments, pull requests, or provider state.
Release remains disabled_pending_proof; HGI-309 owns authenticated external setting/application readback, HGI-305 owns critical-journey proof, and HGI-306 owns continuous-automation admission.
The semantic and closeout commits are unsigned because the configured 1Password signing agent remains unavailable; content, tree, ancestry, push, and remote identity are independently verified.
nonClaims: No provider, environment value, ignored local file, GitHub setting, workflow run, credential, secret, deployment, webhook, message, approval resume, pull request, release, or Production system was read or changed.
A policy pass, action pin, workflow source, public ref, old receipt, model/tool output, or unavailable readback grants no external-operation authority.
